gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed release-bundle planning support, found path/probe validation gaps, all were patched, and final re-review returned no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_public_package.py (50 passed)
PYTHONPATH=src CLI smokes rejected underspecified, duplicate, alias, and plan-output artifact path collisions
what_changed: Added benchmark-plan support for scheduling document-kv release bundle assembly after release evidence validation, including public ReleaseBundlePlanConfig exports, CLI flags, path-collision guardrails, tests, and README usage.
why: The V1 release workflow needs one reproducible plan to prepare datasets, run benchmark/storage/native probe evidence, validate release evidence, and build the checksummed handoff bundle from the same artifact paths.
